lunedì 13 luglio 2026 alle ore 13:59 Ora legale dell’Europa centrale

IMPLEMENTED FIRST-SLICE TOPOLOGY; NOT A PRODUCTION-READINESS CLAIM. Three co-located voter/storage JVMs use an identical static manifest, stable UUID identities, and independent identity, Ratis, object, temporary, and runtime roots. Each JVM owns one Ratis voter and one replica data server. Control and direct replica links require identity-bound mutual TLS. Fixed bootstrap supports no add, promote, demote, replace, or remove operation; production PKI and operational readiness remain outside this slice.
Deployment: Bounded Fixed A/B/C Runtime Baseline
